faqs.question: What spider species are most common in Great Kills homes?
faqs.answer: Great Kills residents most frequently encounter house spiders, cellar spiders (daddy longlegs), and wolf spiders. Occasionally, homeowners near Great Kills Park may also see fishing spiders or orb weavers around outdoor areas. While most local spiders are harmless, our team can identify species and implement targeted control measures.
